access_attempts.result: PubMed abstract and metadata accessed via NCBI E-utilities.
access_attempts.notes: Extraction uses abstract-level results for this baseline pass.

name: Sildenafil does not reliably improve exercise performance in hypoxia: a systematic review.
venue: BMJ Open Sport and Exercise Medicine
summary: Systematic review and meta-analysis of 14 randomized placebo-controlled crossover sildenafil studies in healthy humans under hypoxia, assessing pulmonary artery pressure, cardiac output, oxygen saturation, and exercise performance.
